M. MIŚNIK ATELIER

MACIEJ
MIŚNIK

SCROLL TO EXPLORE

The
Physicist

He walked away from a PhD in physics to master micro-mechanics. Driven by the singular pursuit of perfection, creating every component by hand in solitary dedication.

ZERO CNC

1,000+ Hours

Every wheel, every pinion, every bridge finished by a single pair of hands. A mastery of traditional technique devoid of modern automation.

The
Seaman

A marine chronometer crafted for a father who spent his life on the Baltic Sea. An instrument not merely for time, but for navigation and legacy.

"Independence is freedom.
Freedom means producing
every part myself."
